# meios

> Platform for vertical AI agents (meios). Each meio is a specialized agent with its own personality, tools, and external service integrations — running in an isolated sandbox with persistent storage.

## API

Base URL: https://api.meios.ai
Auth: Bearer token (Supabase JWT or meios API key with `meios_` prefix)
OpenAPI spec: https://github.com/supermeio/xiaozhuo-meios-pi/blob/main/openapi.yaml

## Quick Start

1. Sign up at meios.ai (or via Supabase Auth API)
2. Create API key: POST /api/v1/keys
3. Chat: POST /chat with {"message": "...", "meioType": "wardrobe"}

## Endpoints

### Gateway (api.meios.ai)
- GET /ping — Health check (no auth)
- POST /api/v1/keys — Create API key
- GET /api/v1/keys — List API keys
- DELETE /api/v1/keys/:id — Revoke API key
- PUT /api/v1/credentials/:service — Store encrypted credential
- GET /api/v1/credentials — List credentials (metadata only)
- DELETE /api/v1/credentials/:service — Remove credential
- POST /api/v1/meios — Provision a meio (inline definition or GitHub repo)
- GET /api/v1/meios — List provisioned meios
- DELETE /api/v1/meios/:type — Remove a meio
- GET /api/v1/sandbox/url — Get direct sandbox URL

### Sandbox (proxied through gateway)
- POST /chat — Send message (body: message, meioType?, sessionId?)
- GET /meios — List available meio types
- GET /sessions — List chat sessions
- GET /sessions/:id/messages — Get session messages
- DELETE /sessions/:id — Delete session
- GET /images — List registered images
- GET /collections — List image collections
- POST /collections — Create collection
- GET /collections/:id — Get collection + images
- DELETE /collections/:id — Delete collection
- POST /collections/:id/images — Add image to collection
- DELETE /collections/:id/images/:imgId — Remove image from collection
- GET /closet — List wardrobe items
- GET /fs?path= — List directory
- GET /files/* — Read file
- PUT /files/* — Write file
- GET /health — Sandbox health (no auth)
- GET /cron — List cron tasks

## Meio Types

- default — General-purpose assistant
- wardrobe — Closet management + outfit generation
- reader — Web article summarization → Google Docs (needs Google SA credential)
